intents.name: Trust-led B2B / fintech
intents.blurb: Geometric or grotesque sans pairings. Calm. Clear. Reads as competence.

intents.name: Editorial / publication
intents.blurb: Old-style or transitional serif body with a sans display, or full serif pair. Long-read magazine pages.

intents.name: Brutalist statement
intents.blurb: Condensed sans or display + monospace body. Or a single extreme display.

intents.name: Quiet craft / atelier
intents.blurb: Warm serif headings with humanist sans body. Studio of a ceramicist. Whisper-volume type.

intents.name: Vibrant consumer / playful
intents.blurb: Display sans or decorative + geometric sans body. Confident.

intents.name: Healthcare / clinical
intents.blurb: Humanist sans pair. Warm. Calm. Approachable. No display drama.

pairings.label: Zen Kaku Gothic Antique & Zen Kaku Gothic New

intents.name: Civic / institutional
intents.blurb: Humanist sans + transitional serif. Library, museum, civic letter.

intents.name: Luxury fashion / fragrance
intents.blurb: Thin modern serif heading + geometric sans body. Negative space.

intents.name: Indie game / playful tech
intents.blurb: Display sans or decorative + grotesque body. Mono accent. Plays well.

intents.name: Documentary / journalism
intents.blurb: Transitional serif body + humanist sans display. Long-form reading.

intents.name: Architecture firm
intents.blurb: Grotesque sans + monospace, or all-mono. Reduced palette. Folio of a quiet practice.

intents.name: Restaurant / hospitality
intents.blurb: Old-style serif heading + warm humanist body. Or decorative display + humanist. Golden-hour mood.

intents.name: Outdoor / adventure
intents.blurb: Condensed display + slab or transitional body. Trail guide, outfitter, athletic but earthy.

pairings.label: IBM Plex Sans Condensed & IBM Plex Sans

intents.name: Sustainable / eco
intents.blurb: Humanist sans + transitional serif. Materials-led, low-impact aesthetic.

intents.name: Tech research / academic
intents.blurb: Mono pair, or geometric sans + mono. Reads as careful and considered.

intents.name: Music / record label
intents.blurb: Display serif or decorative + geometric body. Sleeve-art typography.

intents.name: Cinema / film
intents.blurb: High-drama modern serif + geometric sans. Festival poster type.

intents.name: Wine / spirits
intents.blurb: Old-style serif. Calligraphic warmth. Vineyard, cellar, small distillery.

intents.name: Sports / athletic
intents.blurb: Condensed sans + geometric body. Big, athletic, performance.

intents.name: Boutique hotel
intents.blurb: Refined old-style or modern serif + understated humanist body. Lobby of a small Italian hotel.
